name: @radzor/barcode-scan
description: Generate and scan 1D and 2D barcodes. Supports Code128, EAN-13, UPC-A, ITF, Code39, QR Code, and Data Matrix. Produces SVG/PNG output and decodes from image buffers.

inputs.name: height
inputs.description: Barcode height in pixels (ignored for 2D formats).

inputs.name: includeText
inputs.description: Render human-readable text below the barcode.

outputs.name: barcodeBuffer
outputs.description: Generated barcode as PNG or SVG bytes.

outputs.name: scanResult
outputs.type: { data: string; format: string; confidence: number }
outputs.description: Decoded barcode data, format, and detection confidence.

events.name: onGenerated
events.description: Fired when a barcode is generated.

events.name: onScanned
events.description: Fired when a barcode is decoded from an image.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired on generation or scan error.

actions.name: generate
actions.description: Generate a barcode image from data.

actions.name: generateDataUrl
actions.description: Generate a barcode as a base64 data URL for use in tags.

actions.name: scan

params.name: input
params.description: Image as Buffer or file path containing a barcode.

actions.returns: Promise<{ data: string; format: string; confidence: number }>
actions.description: Decode a barcode from an image.

llm.constraints: EAN-13 requires exactly 12 or 13 digits. UPC-A requires 12 digits. Code39 is uppercase alphanumeric only. For scanning, provide a high-contrast image with adequate resolution (>72 DPI).
